headlines.title: U.S. adds just 57,000 jobs in June, a worrying sign as wage growth remains slow
headlines.description: The U.S. economy added just 57,000 jobs in June, a worrying sign for labor market stability as wage growth tracks below inflation for a third consecutive month.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: U.S. economy adds 57,000 jobs in June as the unemployment rate dips to 4.2%
headlines.description: The U.S. economy added 57,000 jobs in June, a worrying sign for labor market stability as wage growth tracked below inflation for a third consecutive month. NBC News' Allie Canal and Investopedia editor-in-chief Caleb Silver break down the latest numbers.

headlines.title: Buying Refurbished Tech? Avoid These Major Mistakes
headlines.description: Buying refurbished and second-hand items can save you some money but is it a safe investment? NBC’s Brian Cheung joins TODAY to share important do’s and don’ts and how to avoid being scammed.

headlines.title: July 2026 Freebies: Slurpees, Apple’s Tech Camp for Kids, More
headlines.description: From fun Fourth of July activities to Apple’s camp program to help kids develop tech skills, NBC’s chief consumer investigative correspondent Vicky Nguyen joins TODAY with a roundup of ways to cash-in on freebies for the month of July.

headlines.title: July 4 Sales: What to Buy Now (and What to Hold off On)
headlines.description: The Fourth of July sales are officially here so NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY to with where to find the best deals and the items with the biggest discounts.

headlines.title: Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill’ is bringing a big set of student loan changes
headlines.description: Starting Wednesday, many student borrowers may tackle higher repayment requirements, fewer program options and greater loan limits.

headlines.title: Trump won’t renew USMCA deal, toppling a pillar of global trade stability
headlines.description: The decision is a stark reversal for the president, who signed the North American pact in 2018 and called it the “most important trade deal ever.”

headlines.title: Fed chairman says inflation risks are declining, predicts AI will create jobs
headlines.description: Kevin Warsh also declined to give any clues about the Federal Reserve’s next moves on interest rates.

headlines.title: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: U.S. lifts ban on Anthropic’s powerful Fable 5 AI model
headlines.description: Part of the company’s Claude family of AI systems, Fable 5 was forced offline after administration officials said it posed severe cybersecurity risks.

headlines.title: Trump’s financial disclosure lists $1.4 billion in crypto earnings, powered largely by meme coins
headlines.description: The annual report also includes $80 million in income from settlements tied to his lawsuits against companies like ABC, CBS, Meta and YouTube.
